chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5702 of 2019 Muhammad Altaf Hussain Shaikh Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to maintainability of petition. Dated: 05.05.2025 None present. -.-.- This is an old case of 2019, which is over six years old. At the very outset learned counsel for the petitioner was directed to satisfy the Court about maintainability of this petition. On the last date of hearing on 10.12.2019, which is over six years ago, counsel was again given time so that he could prepare himself on maintainability. Despite lapse of six years learned counsel for the petitioner has not pursued this petition diligently and question of maintainability still remains outstanding. Today none is present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending applications. Head of Const. Benches Judge
